An AI-assisted Figma-to-code workflow that automatically interprets Jira tickets and Figma designs to generate production-ready React components. It transforms UI development from a manual, error-prone task into a
that ensures consistency and accelerates delivery from ticket creation to pull request.

Access to Figma MCP (License / REST API)
Using the Figma MCP License provides structured, native access to design metadata. If MCP is not available, a REST API–based integration ensures continuity by:
Fetching consistent component and layer data.
Reducing dependency on manual export workflows.
Stabilizing access to tokens, constraints, and naming conventions
